chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1018 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 04.12.2025 Mr. Muawar Ali, advocate for the petitioner None present for the respondent Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG --------- Through this petition, the petitioner has challenged the order dated 30.01.2025 passed in Civil Revision Application No.67 of 2024 by learned Addl. District Judge-XII, Karachi South and order dated 18.04.2024 passed in Civil Ex. No. 03/2023 by learned 1st Senior Civil Judge, Karachi, South, whereby CNIC of the judgment debtor was blocked in execution proceedings. Learned AAG, who is present in other matters, waives notice of this petition and states that he has no objection if the instant petition is allowed. Order XXI Rule 11 CPC empowers executing Court to take appropriate measures for satisfaction of the decree, but it cannot block CNIC of the J.D. Under such circumstances, this petition is allowed and the orders dated 30.01.2025 and 18.04.2024 passed by the Courts below are set aside. However, learned trial Court is at liberty to adopt other modes of execution for satisfaction of the decree. JUDGE Nadir*
